formulas.expr: case when [会员ID] is not null and [会员ID] <> '' then 1 else 0 end
formulas.name: 会员订单计数

formulas.expr: case when [是否90天内新店] = 'TRUE' then   case when datediff([业务日期],[开业日期]) <= 7 then 'W1'        when datediff([业务日期],[开业日期]) <= 14 then 'W2'        when datediff([业务日期],[开业日期]) <= 30 then 'M1'        when datediff([业务日期],[开业日期]) <= 60 then 'M2'        else 'M3+' end else 'Comp老店' end
formulas.name: 爬坡阶段

formulas.expr: case when [是否90天内新店] = 'TRUE' then '新店'      when datediff([业务日期],[开业日期]) > 365 then 'Comp老店'      else '次新店' end
formulas.name: 门店成长类型

formulas.expr: case when [订单数] > 0 then [会员订单数] * 1.0 / [订单数] else 0 end
formulas.name: 会员订单占比

actions.name: 计算爬坡阶段+成长类型
